responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! How can I help with your complaint or request?
Welcome! How may I help you today?
Goodbye! Have a great day.
See you later! Feel free to return if you need help.
Take care! I'm always here to help.
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
Glad I could assist you.

I can help you with:
• Filing a complaint
• Tracking complaint status
• Providing feedback
• General support
You can ask me to track complaints, register complaints, or give feedback.

patterns: i want to file a complaint
responses: You can submit a complaint through the Complaint page.
Please visit the complaint form to register your issue.
To file a complaint, go to the Complaint section and fill out the form.

patterns: what is the status of my complaint
responses: Please provide your complaint ID to track the status.
Sure, share your complaint ID and I will check the status.
Enter your complaint number and I will help track it.
Feedback can be submitted after your complaint is resolved.
You can provide feedback through the feedback page once the issue is resolved.

patterns: how long does complaint resolution take
when will my complaint be resolved
how much time for complaint resolution
how many days to solve complaint
responses: Most complaints are resolved within 24-48 hours depending on the issue.
Resolution time depends on the complaint category but usually takes 1-2 days.

patterns: what types of complaints can i submit
responses: You can file complaints related to service issues, technical problems, billing concerns, or general feedback.
Common complaints include service problems, technical errors, and billing disputes.

patterns: i want to talk to human
responses: If you need further assistance, please contact customer support through the Help page.
You can reach our support team through the contact support section.
I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please rephrase?
I may not have the answer to that. Try asking about complaints or support.
